name: Crowe, Allison
source_notes: Sy Scholfield quotes Crowe on Twitter: "These are amazing. My birthday is nov 16 I sure hope she wishes me a happy birthday.... lol: [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1177748182173913090], "This isn’t a humblebrag- this is me - being 36 years old - and FINALLY not being afraid to fully live my life for the first time as an adult. 8 year old me is finally proud of me" (posted 17 Sep 2018) [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1041878226283446272], "Ahhh my Home town!! Glad you had fun in Nanaimo :)" [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1126934677850394626], "My cap ascendant reacting to my Leo moon lol while scorpio sun is just doing it’s own thing" [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1228839729006882816], "Scorp sun/ Leo moon / cap rising" [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1224894615817523200], "Scorp sun/Leo moon/ cap rising - Libra stellium in 9th house Saturn/Pluto/Jupiter - not sure what that means! Hahaha" [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1251351153717248000], "Scorpio sun and mercury Capricorn rising and Venus hahaha" [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1255221192115576840], "Mercury in Scorpio in 9th house... didn’t go to uni lol" [https://twitter.com/Allison_Crowe/status/1251535347873349632]. A birth time of about 11:15 AM gives this combination.\n
categories: Vocation : Entertain/Music : Vocalist/ Pop, Rock, etc.
